metadata.title: GoHighLevel & n8n Agency in Estonia & CEE | Alopex Digital
metadata.description: Advanced HighLevel & RevOps infrastructure for sales-led businesses. We architect, build, and launch systems that stop revenue leaking.
metadata.ogDescription: Advanced HighLevel & RevOps infrastructure for sales-led businesses. We architect, build, and launch systems that stop revenue leaking.

hero.label: GoHighLevel & n8n Agency
hero.title: Your Revenue Operations,
hero.subtitle: We map your business process, build your GoHighLevel infrastructure, and make sure your team actually uses it. No more leads leaking through manual chaos.

inlineCta.afterProcessMicro: Free discovery call — we’ll map where you’re losing revenue.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: GoHighLevel & RevOps Agency
about.p1: Alopex Digital is the elite, lean “Maaletooja” (market-bringer) of GoHighLevel infrastructure — bringing world-class US revenue operations technology to sales-led service businesses across Estonia, Poland, and CEE.
about.p2: We don’t just build systems. We architect clarity — mapping your entire business process before writing a single workflow. Then we build it, launch it, and make sure your team actually uses it. That’s the difference.
about.purposeQuote: “To orchestrate clarity and flow for ambitious businesses.”
about.purposeDescription: We build freedom machines — automated systems that free up your time so you can focus on growth.

items.pain: Leads leaking due to poor follow-up on 10-50k EUR deals
items.outcome: Automated follow-up sequences that close the gap between lead and signed contract.

items.pain: Managing buyer/seller pipelines with unmatched leads dropping off
items.outcome: CRM workflows that match, nurture, and never let a warm lead slip.

items.pain: Ghosting and poor candidate experience across B2B + B2C flows
items.outcome: Candidate and client experiences that protect your brand and fill roles faster.

items.title: Strategic Blueprinting
items.subtitle: We architect before we build
items.description: We don’t guess; we map your entire business process before building a single workflow. Most agencies skip straight to building. We mitigate risk by thinking like an owner first.

items.title: Advanced API Ecosystems
items.subtitle: Beyond basic integrations
items.description: We build custom API bridges that connect HighLevel to any legacy or local system. Your CRM becomes the central brain of your company, not just another tool.

items.title: Regional RevOps Fluency
items.subtitle: The “Maaletooja” factor
items.description: We know the culture, the language, and the laws. GDPR, local payment gateways, regional tax logic — we translate world-class US tech into solutions that work in your specific market.

services.label: What We Build
services.title: GoHighLevel solutions
services.intro: We deliver a complete revenue operations stack — powered by GoHighLevel and connected to your local systems through custom n8n integrations.

platformItems.title: CRM & Pipeline Management
platformItems.description: Track every deal from first touch to signed contract

platformItems.title: Marketing Automation
platformItems.description: Nurture leads with automated email, SMS, and workflow sequences

platformItems.title: Calendar & Booking
platformItems.description: Let prospects book directly — no back-and-forth emails

platformItems.title: Reputation Management
platformItems.description: Collect and showcase reviews on autopilot

platformItems.title: Websites & Funnels
platformItems.description: Launch high-converting pages without a developer

platformItems.title: Forms & Surveys
platformItems.description: Capture leads and feedback with smart, branded forms

platformItems.title: Invoicing & Payments
platformItems.description: Send invoices and collect payments inside your CRM

platformItems.title: Reporting & Dashboards
platformItems.description: See your entire revenue pipeline in one dashboard

integrationItems.title: ERP & Accounting
integrationItems.description: Connect Merit Aktiva, e-Arveldaja, or any accounting system

integrationItems.title: E-Signature Platforms
integrationItems.description: Automate document signing with Dokobit or SignHere

integrationItems.title: Local Payment Gateways
integrationItems.description: Integrate Montonio, EveryPay, and regional payment methods

integrationItems.title: Government & Tax Portals
integrationItems.description: Automate tax reporting and regulatory compliance

integrationItems.title: Legacy CRM Migration
integrationItems.description: Move your data from any old system — clean and complete

integrationItems.title: Custom API Bridges
integrationItems.description: If it has an API, we can connect it to your CRM

useCases.pain: Stop losing 10–50k deals to poor follow-up
useCases.solution: Automated lead response within minutes, pipeline tracking per sales rep, and SMS/email sequences that nurture until the contract is signed.
useCases.outcome: Faster response, fewer lost deals, full pipeline visibility

useCases.pain: Never let a matched lead slip away
useCases.solution: CRM workflows that match buyers to sellers, automated nurture for cold leads, and booking links that eliminate scheduling friction.
useCases.outcome: Every lead tracked, every match followed up, zero dropped balls

useCases.pain: End candidate ghosting, protect your brand
useCases.solution: Automated candidate communication at every stage, client-facing dashboards, and feedback loops that close the experience gap.
useCases.outcome: Candidates stay engaged, clients see progress, your brand stays strong

services.ctaDescription: Book a free discovery call — we'll map your needs in 30 minutes.

steps.title: The Systems Audit
steps.description: We understand the problem before we design the solution. In 1-2 meetings, we assess your current pains, processes, and bottlenecks to identify exactly where revenue is leaking.

steps.title: The Strategic Blueprint
steps.description: A clear roadmap with no surprises. We map the full solution architecture, scope the timeline, and define every integration. This deliverable is yours to keep.

steps.title: The Architecture Build
steps.description: Transparent progress and technical excellence. We build your GoHighLevel infrastructure, integrate custom APIs via n8n, and configure automation — with weekly reporting via ClickUp.

steps.title: The Frictionless Launch
steps.description: We don’t leave until your team is comfortable using the system. Hands-on training, UI tweaks, and adoption support — because delivery isn’t done until your team is using it.

steps.title: The Growth Loop
steps.description: We ensure the system evolves with your business. Bi-weekly stabilization calls transition to quarterly strategy reviews, keeping your infrastructure ahead of your growth.

items.title: Ownership Mindset
items.subtitle: Responsibility and Reward
items.description: We treat our clients’ businesses as our own. Proactive, fiduciary, and never saying ‘that’s not my job.’ We bring positive change and reward results.

items.title: Responsible Freedom
items.subtitle: Disciplined Autonomy
items.description: We work from anywhere, but we never leave the team hanging. Output over hours. Autonomy earned through reliability and high performance.

items.title: Everything is Figureoutable
items.subtitle: Technical Resourcefulness
items.description: A relentless problem-solving mentality. We leverage collective intelligence — AI, documentation, community — to overcome every wall. ‘I don’t know’ is never a final answer.

items.title: Truth Over Ego
items.subtitle: Meritocracy & Transparency
items.description: Radical transparency with our team and clients. The best idea wins, regardless of title or tenure. We build trust through vulnerability and honesty.

items.title: Have Heart
items.subtitle: Empathy & Human Connection
items.description: Behind every ticket and API call is a human being. We support each other’s growth, well-being, and success. High performance requires high care.

items.title: The User Adoption Promise
items.description: We don’t just build it; we ensure you use it. If your team isn’t confident using the system after our launch training, we will provide additional retraining sessions at no cost until they are.

items.title: The Blueprint Credit
items.description: You pay for the Architecture, not the Sales Pitch. If you choose us for the Build, 100% of your Blueprint fee is credited toward implementation. If you go elsewhere, you keep the plans.

cta.title: Ready to stop
cta.description: Book a free discovery call. We’ll map your current pains and show you exactly where the opportunities are — no obligation, no sales pitch.
cta.microCopy: 30-minute call. No obligation. We’ll map where you’re losing revenue.

footer.tagline: GoHighLevel & n8n infrastructure for ambitious service businesses across Estonia, Poland, and CEE.
footer.copyright: Alopex Digital OÜ. All rights reserved.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for Alopex Digital - how we collect, use and protect your data

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Alopex Digital OÜ is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you visit our website or use our services.

dataCollected.title: 2. Data We Collect
dataCollected.content: We collect contact information (name, email, phone), business information (company, role), usage data (pages visited, time on site), and cookies for functionality and analytics.

legalBasis.title: 3. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.content: We process data based on: contract performance, legitimate interest, consent (for marketing), and legal obligations under GDPR Article 6.

thirdParties.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdParties.content: We share data with trusted providers: GoHighLevel (CRM), Meta (advertising), Google (analytics), TikTok (advertising), and n8n (automation). All comply with EU-US Data Privacy Framework or Standard Contractual Clauses.

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.content: Contact submissions: 3 years. Client data: contract duration + 7 years. Analytics: 26 months. Marketing consent: until withdrawn + 3 years.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: Under GDPR you have rights to: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, objection, and withdrawal of consent. Contact info@alopex.digital to exercise your rights.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.content: We use necessary cookies (site functionality), analytics cookies (usage statistics), and marketing cookies (advertising). Manage preferences via our cookie consent banner.

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights:

supervisory.title: 9. Supervisory Authority
supervisory.content: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Estonian Data Protection Inspectorate:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms of Service for Alopex Digital - rules governing use of our services

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: These Terms of Service govern your use of the website, services, and software products provided by Alopex Digital OÜ (registry code 17180489). By using our services, you agree to these Terms.

services.title: 2. Services
services.content: Alopex Digital provides consulting services (CRM implementation, workflow automation), software products (custom automations, integrations), and managed services (ongoing support, maintenance).

obligations.title: 3. Client Obligations
obligations.content: Clients agree to: provide accurate information, grant necessary system access, respond timely to requests, maintain credential confidentiality, comply with applicable laws, and pay invoices per agreed terms.

payment.title: 4. Payment Terms
payment.content: Standard payment term: 14 days from invoice date. Invoices in EUR. Late payments may incur 0.05% daily interest. Services may be suspended for accounts 30+ days overdue.

ip.title: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.content: We retain ownership of pre-existing tools and methodologies. Clients own custom deliverables created specifically for them (upon full payment) and their business-specific configurations.

confidentiality.title: 6. Confidentiality
confidentiality.content: Both parties agree to keep confidential information private, use it only for service delivery, and not disclose to third parties without consent. Obligations survive 3 years after termination.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Our total liability shall not exceed fees paid in the 12 months preceding the claim. We are not liable for indirect damages, lost profits, or issues from third-party services.

termination.title: 8. Termination
termination.content: Either party may terminate: for convenience with 30 days notice, or immediately for material breach not cured within 14 days. Upon termination, client pays for services rendered.

governing.title: 9. Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms are governed by Estonian law. Disputes shall be resolved in Harju County Court, Estonia. EU consumers may use the EU ODR platform at ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.
